chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.B.A. No.S-1113 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No. 9450/2022 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on M.A. 9451/2022 4. For hearing of main case 25.10.2022 Ms. Hassina Kanwal advocate for applicants along with applicants. -.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. It is stated that applicantsare innocent but have been falsely implicated in this case out of enmity; that the applicants want to surrender before the trial court but need protection as they apprehend their arrest. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicantsare granted protective bail for 06 days from today subject to execution of PR Bond in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 06 days on 30.10.2022 or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. Bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
